title: Best portable mini projectors | Bin Diving

recommendations.product_name: Nebula by Anker Capsule 3 Laser (Nebula Capsule 3)
cons: Can be pricey vs budget minis

pros: Android TV/Google TV ecosystem, strong auto-focus & ISA tech
cons: Some firmware/streaming app reports from users
May require purchase from official retailers for best support

recommendations.product_name: Samsung The Freestyle (2nd Gen / Freestyle+ variants)
pros: Very portable swivel design with smart TV features
Improved brightness in newer Freestyle+ / 2nd‑gen models
cons: Original model had middling brightness for daylight use
Some users report occasional image/startup issues
